strengths: Maintained steady traction throughout the cutting sequence
Completed the circle cut within reasonable time parameters
Demonstrated consistent instrument control during the procedure
weaknesses: Cut deviated from the marked circle at multiple points
Precision suffered during curved sections of the pattern
Line following accuracy needs refinement for benchmark performance

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing between sections to verify alignment with the marked line.
drills.targets_weakness: Cut deviated from the marked circle at multiple points

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle during curved cuts, focusing on maintaining optimal cutting geometry.
drills.targets_weakness: Precision suffered during curved sections of the pattern

drills.name: Edge-entry rehearsal
drills.description: 15 starts from the gauze edge to marked reference points without overshoot, emphasizing precise initial positioning and controlled advancement.

progression_note: At the advanced level, focus on eliminating line deviations to achieve consistent sub-5 point penalty scores. Your time is competitive but precision refinements will push you toward benchmark performance.
